privacy_intro: The protection of your personal data is a special concern to us. We therefore process your data exclusively on the basis of legal regulations.
privacy_data_text: We collect email address and name during registration. Sensor data (soil moisture, temperature, etc.) is transmitted securely and stored on our servers.
privacy_usage_text: Your data is used exclusively to provide app functionality. It is not passed on to third parties.
privacy_rights_text: You have the right to information, correction, deletion, and restriction of the processing of your data at any time.
faq_q1: How do I connect my HydroPilot pot?
faq_a1: Ensure Bluetooth is enabled on your phone and tap 'Add' on the home screen.
faq_q2: Why is the soil showing as offline?
faq_a2: Check your sensor's WiFi connection and ensure the battery is charged.
faq_q3: How do I calibrate the sensor?
faq_a3: Place the sensor in completely dry soil for 0% and in a glass of water for 100%.
